security.title: Security & Governance
security.subtitle: We build AI agents that can be trusted — with clear boundaries, approvals, and auditability.
security.principlesSubtitle: Every agent we deploy follows these non-negotiable standards, regardless of project size or budget.

principles.title: Secrets & Credential Isolation
principles.desc: API keys and credentials are never embedded in agent configs. We use environment-level secret management and per-agent isolation to prevent cross-contamination.

principles.title: Minimal Permission Scoping
principles.desc: Each agent receives only the permissions required for its specific task: no broad read/write access. We follow least privilege throughout.

principles.title: Human Approval Gates
principles.desc: High-stakes actions require explicit human confirmation before execution, regardless of automation level.

principles.title: Full Audit Trail
principles.desc: Every agent action, decision point, and data access is logged so you can review what happened and when.

principles.title: Sandbox vs. Production Separation
principles.desc: All agents are built and tested in isolated sandbox environments. We do not test with production data or live credentials.

principles.title: Incident Response Playbook
principles.desc: Every deployment includes a documented incident response plan for detection, pause, and recovery.

precheck.title: Security Pre-Check Service
precheck.body: Before you deploy any agents, or if you already have agents running, our Security Pre-Check gives you a written assessment with prioritized findings and remediation steps.
precheck.priceLine: From CAD 800 ? 1 day ? Remote or onsite Ottawa
reviewItems: Agent credential storage and rotation practices
Permission scoping for each agent and integration
Data flows and sensitive data handling

quarterly.title: Quarterly Agent Security Reviews
quarterly.body: Agent frameworks evolve fast. Our quarterly review retainer keeps deployed agents secure with updated threat modeling, changelog review, and permission re-auditing every three months.

faqs.question: Do agents have access to all my business data?
faqs.answer: No. Agents only access the specific data sources and scopes required for their task. We explicitly configure and document each permission during setup.

faqs.question: What happens if an agent makes a mistake or acts unexpectedly?
faqs.answer: We define approval gates for high-risk actions and implement circuit breakers. Our incident response playbook covers how to pause, roll back, or terminate agents immediately.

faqs.question: Is my data sent to third-party AI models?
faqs.answer: We document which data passes through which AI services during design. For sensitive workloads, we can architect solutions that minimize or eliminate external data transmission.

faqs.question: What is the Security Pre-Check service?
faqs.answer: A one-day review that assesses your current or planned setup against our security baseline. You receive a written report with prioritized findings and remediation steps.

faqs.question: Do you offer ongoing security monitoring?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our Quarterly Agent Security Review retainer includes regular audits, framework changelog reviews, and updated threat modeling.

finalCta.title: Not Sure How Secure Your Agents Are?
finalCta.subtitle: Start with a Security Pre-Check and get clear, written findings in one day.
